name: SOaC-011 GenAI LLM Abuse Indicators
description: CrowdStrike Falcon IOA rules detecting GenAI/LLM abuse patterns including prompt injection payloads in process arguments, unauthorized model file downloads, and suspicious AI framework process chains

rules.name: Prompt Injection Payload in Process Args
rules.description: Detects prompt injection strings passed as command-line arguments to AI/LLM processes

rules.name: Unauthorized AI Model File Download
rules.description: Detects download of large AI model files from untrusted sources

rules.name: Suspicious AI Framework Execution Chain
rules.description: Detects AI inference processes spawning shell or network tools indicating potential abuse
